page.title: Category:All Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:All_Wikipedia_neutral_point_of_view_disputes]]
ce, add random, topic filter
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
1 revision imported
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes|description=This category tracks all disputes tagged via {{tlx|POV}}}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}}}'''}}}} {{Filter category by topic}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:All Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes]] [[WP:NPOV|NPOV]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Monthly clean-up category (Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes) counter]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes| ]]

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes|description=This category tracks all  disputes tagged via {{tlx|POV}}}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}}}'''}}}}
{{Filter category by topic}}

<!--categories-->
